Payments to figure close. By our says, hey, what are my payments going to be? Sir, until you and I come to an agreement on the price, the product, and the terms, you really don't need to concern yourself with payments, as there won't be any. Look, I need your initial here, here, and here on what? Peace in terms, not just the payments.
